title: Custom nether portal size
description: Removes Nether portal size restrictions. Build them from 2x3 up to nearly infinite!
body:
Custom Portal Size

A lightweight Fabric mod that removes the restrictive vanilla limits for Nether Portals.

Features:
Maximum size: Extends the limit from 21 blocks to 2,000,000 blocks.
Server-side & Client-side: Required on both for correct logic.
